what: Remove deleted entry from knowledge database
why: Index must no longer reference the deleted entry

output.console: Index update result confirming entry removal

error_handling.action: Log as warning, the file is deleted but may still appear in stale index until next full rebuild

event.message: Index update failed after deleting entry

decisions.reason: Direct DB DELETE instead of full index rebuild
decisions.rationale: Running the full knowledge-index-build flow after every delete is too slow. A targeted DELETE is sufficient and fast.
